title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Treebo Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
